content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

June 24, 2009

Tony Campos
Supervisor, Santa Cruz County
617 East Lake Ave.
Watsonville, CA 95076

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-134

Dear Mr. Campos:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn your request for advice after unsuccessfully attempting to contact you, at the phone number you have provided, for additional information necessary to issue advice.

On June 8, 2009, we were contacted by Gustavo Gonzalez. Mr. Gonzalez stated that he was calling on your behalf as a representative of the County of Santa Cruz. Mr. Gonzalez further stated that the Santa Cruz Board of Supervisors would consider the governmental decision, for which you had sought advice, on June 9, 2009. Accordingly, it appears that this decision has already been made.

In addition, we attempted to contact you on June 15 and June 22, 2009, leaving a voice mail on both occasions. These attempts to contact you were to confirm whether or not the decision, to which your request for advice was related, had already been made and, if the decision had not yet been made, to request additional information necessary to issue advice. Because we have not received a response to our questions, we are withdrawing your request for advice at this time.

Should you still need assistance, you will need to resubmit your request. If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Brian G. Lau
Counsel, Legal Division

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice on a governmental decision to be made by the Santa Cruz Board of Supervisors, but the decision appears to have already been made before the FPPC could provide advice.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC withdrew the request for advice because the decision was apparently already made by the Board of Supervisors on June 9, 2009, and the requestor failed to respond to multiple contact attempts for clarification and additional information.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal letter with no QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. The legal issue and FPPC's reasoning are contained in the body of the correspondence. File number indicates this was assigned as a withdrawal case (W-09-134).

QUESTION: The requestor sought advice on a governmental decision to be made by the Santa Cruz Board of Supervisors, but the decision appears to have already been made before the FPPC could provide advice.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC withdrew the request for advice because the decision was apparently already made by the Board of Supervisors on June 9, 2009, and the requestor failed to respond to multiple contact attempts for clarification and additional information.

embedding.summary: The FPPC withdrew a request for advice (File No. W-09-134) from Tony Campos regarding a Santa Cruz County governmental decision because the decision had already been made and the requestor did not respond to follow-up contact attempts.
